creator: m.ne@gmx.net
text:
Created attachment 213591
patch for print/lilypond to 2.20.0

- take maintainership
- sync up with lilypond-devel

Unfortunately the change towards python 3 was only done in the 2.21 branch.  However, the changes involved are fairly trivial and backporting them here just requires some legwork due to the number of files involved. If there isn't going to be an official release with the change that will be my course of action.
